zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance de France於大約1124年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰道多哈帕格-吉方泰時，她的父親Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs44歲，母親Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France33歲。她於1140年與Eustace de Blois IV Count of  Mortain在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲結婚。她去世於1176年8月16日在法國德 艾斯特芒內萊姆斯享年53歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: France
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from France (see 2 below).

French: habitational name given to someone from France (at the time when the name only applied to those lands belonging to the French king, covering only a small part of its current territory) or from Île-de-France (i.e. from a region centered on Paris); or, in southern France, an ethnic name for someone from what is now the northern half of the country, where the langue d'oïl (Old French as distinct from Occitan) was spoken. Compare   Defrance   and   Lafrance  .
Czech (Franče): from a pet form of František, Latin Franciscus (see Francis ).

variants.name: Defrance
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Henri, Jean-Paul.

French (mainly northern): habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, given to someone from France (at the time when the name only applied to those lands belonging to the French king, covering only a small part of its current territory) or from Île-de-France (i.e. from a region centered on Paris). Compare France .

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

en.lifeSummary: When Constance de France was born about 1124, in Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, her father, Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs, was 44 and her mother, Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France, was 33. She married Eustace de Blois IV Count of  Mortain in 1140, in Paris, Île-de-France, France. She died on 16 August 1176, in Reims, Marne, Grand Est, France, at the age of 53, and was buried in Paris, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance de France est née environ 1124, à Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Eustace de Blois IV Count of  Mortain en 1140, à Paris, Île-de-France, France. Elle est décédée le 16 août 1176, à Reims, Marne, Grand Est, France, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Paris, Île-de-France, France.

de.Saint Edmunds Abbey, Bury, Suffolk, Engl: St Edmund's Church, Maids Moreton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Constance de France um 1124 in Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs 44 und ihre Mutter Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France 33. Sie hat 1140 in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich Eustace de Blois IV Count of  Mortain geheiratet. Sie starb am 16. August 1176 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Reims, Marne, Großer Osten, Frankreich und wurde in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

Lei sposato Eustace de Blois IV Count of  Mortain nel 1140, nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia. Morì il 16 agosto 1176, nel Reims, Marne, Grand Est, Francia, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance de Franceが約1124年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインドールドグンチャンプアグネ-エト-フォンティアインで生まれた時，父Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francsは44歳，母Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de Franceは33歳であった。1140年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスでEustace de Blois IV Count of  Mortainと結婚した。彼女は1176年8月16日にフランスグランド エストマルンレイムズで53歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Constance de France(이)가 대략 1124년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 도르도그니 챔파그니-트-폰테인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1140년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 Eustace de Blois IV Count of  Mortain(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1176년 8월 16일 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 마니 레임스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Constance de France nasceu aproximadamente 1124, em Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Eustace de Blois IV Count of  Mortain em 1140, em Paris, Île-de-France, França. Ela faleceu em 16 de agosto de 1176, em Reims, Marne, Grand Est, França, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Paris, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance de France родилась около 1124 г. в местности чампагне-ет-фонтеин, дордогн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, её отцу по имени Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Eustace de Blois IV Count of  Mortain в 1140 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. Она умерла 16 августа 1176 г. в местности римс, марн, гранд эст, Франция в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Constance de France nació aproximadamente 1124, en Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Eustace de Blois IV Count of  Mortain en 1140, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia. Murió el 16 de agosto de 1176, en Reims, Marne, Grand Est, Francia, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.
